title: Hewitt continues frightening form to reach Wimbledon juniors semifinal
summary: Cruz Hewitt continues to better his famous father's Wimbledon juniors record after yet another convincing win at the All England Club.
imageAlt: Hewitt continues frightening form to reach Wimbledon juniors semifinal

fullArticle:
Cruz Hewitt (pictured) continued his dominant Wimbledon campaign with another straight-sets win. (Getty Images: Matthias Hangst)

Cruz Hewitt has qualified for the semifinals of the Wimbledon boys' tournament after another straight-sets win.

Hewitt ousted Bulgarian No.9 seed Dimitar Kisimov 6-1, 6-2, and is yet to drop a set in four matches at the All England Club.

Elsewhere, Australian duo Marc Polmans and Storm Hunter were beaten in the mixed doubles final by Marcelo Arevalo and Jelena Ostapenko.

Cruz Hewitt has qualified for the semifinals of the Wimbledon boys' event after a crushing straight-sets win.

The 17-year-old continued his impressive run as the last Australian singles player in action in the junior event, crushing Bulgarian ninth seed Dimitar Kisimov 6-1, 6-2 in just 53 mi...
